known_deviations: Dukascopy supplies bounded one-hour liquid-session top-of-book slices here, not the exact 20-session authority export.
The AAPL file is a single-provider top-of-book feed rather than an exact NBBO pack.
The ES1 file is populated with Dukascopy E_SandP-500, which is useful but not the exact ES1 contract.
The EURUSD file is useful top-of-book rehearsal data, but it is still a bounded proxy slice rather than the exact authority pack under proofs/phase06_inputs/ticks/.
FT-C004 remains NEEDS_LABELS; unlabeled retrieval is non-authority.
Minimum tick compression remains below the 8x authority floor (7.1596x).
open_blockers: Materialize the declared 30-symbol 24-month 1-minute OHLCV authority pack under proofs/phase06_inputs/ohlcv/.
Materialize the remaining rights-safe tick targets under proofs/phase06_inputs/ticks/: AAPL NBBO/top-of-book, ES1 top-of-book, EURUSD top-of-book.
Attach labeled or auditable FT-C004 truth; unlabeled queries remain non-authority.
